steps.title: Write the total bags equation
steps.content:
The vendor sold 180 total bags of tea and cashews. Since $x$ is tea bags and $y$ is cashew bags:
$$x + y = 180$$

steps.title: Write the revenue equation and identify the system
steps.content:
Tea costs 7 dollars per bag and cashews cost 12 dollars per bag. Total revenue is 1,820 dollars, so:
$$7x + 12y = 1,820$$
Our system is: $x + y = 180$ and $7x + 12y = 1,820$. Only Choice C — $7x + 12y = 1,820$ $x + y = 180$ lists both equations in this form. That matches Choice C — $7x + 12y = 1,820$ $x + y = 180$.
